My Work

Featured Projects

Real-world applications built from scratch — each one solving a genuine problem with clean architecture and modern tech.

⭐ Graduation Project

EduVisionAI — Adaptive Learning Platform

A full-stack AI-powered EdTech SaaS that transforms any educational content (videos, PDFs, YouTube URLs, images) into a complete interactive learning experience — automatically.

  • Multimodal AI pipeline: Whisper STT + LLaMA-3 70B via Groq LPUs
  • Auto-generates summaries, MCQ quizzes, flashcards (SM-2), and mind maps
  • Real-time collaborative study rooms via WebSockets
  • Gamification system: XP, RPG skill tree & global leaderboard
  • Full Arabic RTL support + light/dark mode
  • 30-min lecture fully processed in under 130 seconds
React.js Node.js MongoDB LLaMA-3 Whisper WebSocket Docker Groq
GitHub
Full Stack App

BookTheBest — Luxury Hotel Booking System

A complete hotel booking platform with an immersive dark-luxury UI. Supports end-to-end user journey from browsing hotels to booking rooms, plus a full admin management console.

  • Immersive glassmorphism UI with Framer Motion animations
  • JWT authentication + Role-Based Access Control (Admin / User)
  • Admin Management Console: manage properties, rooms & live bookings
  • Real-time booking status with WhatsApp integration
  • Room availability system with image upload
React.js Vite Node.js Express.js MongoDB JWT Framer Motion
GitHub
